ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg
Language: go
CloudNativePG is a comprehensive platform designed to seamlessly manage PostgreSQL databases within Kubernetes environments, covering the entire operational lifecycle from initial deployment to ongoing maintenance

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudreve/cloudreve
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudreve/cloudreve
Language: go
🌩 Self-hosted file management and sharing system, supports multiple storage providers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coder/coder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coder/coder
Language: go
Secure environments for developers and their agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ddev/ddev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ddev/ddev
Language: go
Docker-based local PHP+Node.js web development environments

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dstotijn/hetty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dstotijn/hetty
Language: go
An HTTP toolkit for security research.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elastic/beats
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elastic/beats
Language: go
🐠 Beats - Lightweight shippers for Elasticsearch & Logstash

ns0:entry.ns0:title: getlago/lago
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/getlago/lago
Language: go
Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

ns0:entry.ns0:title: golang/go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/golang/go
Language: go
The Go programming language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/adk-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/adk-go
Language: go
An open-source, code-first Go toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/osv-scanner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/osv-scanner
Language: go
Vulnerability scanner written in Go which uses the data provided by https://osv.dev

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gosom/google-maps-scraper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gosom/google-maps-scraper
Language: go
scrape data from Google Maps. Extracts data such as the name, address, phone number, website URL, rating, reviews number, latitude and longitude, reviews,email and more for each place

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/k6
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/k6
Language: go
A modern load testing tool, using Go and JavaScript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hatchet-dev/hatchet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hatchet-dev/hatchet
Language: go
🪓 An orchestration engine for background tasks, AI agents, and durable workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: henrygd/beszel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/henrygd/beszel
Language: go
Lightweight server monitoring with historical data, docker stats, and alerts.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: keploy/keploy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/keploy/keploy
Language: go
Open-source platform for creating safe, isolated production sandboxes for API, integration, and E2E testing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: larksuite/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/larksuite/cli
Language: go
The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 20+ AI Agent Skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mostlygeek/llama-swap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mostlygeek/llama-swap
Language: go
Reliable model swapping for any local OpenAI/Anthropic compatible server - llama.cpp, vllm, etc

ns0:entry.ns0:title: multica-ai/multica
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/multica-ai/multica
Language: go
The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/cli-printing-press
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/cli-printing-press
Language: go
Every API has a secret identity. This finds it, absorbs every feature from every competing tool, then builds the GOAT CLI — designed for AI agents first, with SQLite sync, offline search, and compound insight commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/printing-press-library
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/printing-press-library
Language: go
Official library of CLIs generated by the CLI Printing Press. Endorsed, tested, and community-contributed.
